notes: This payload is app-native and derived from the macro-free Utility Dash workbook.
Readings with unresolved or placeholder dates were excluded from app-native reading import and written to unresolved-date review CSV.
Consumption uses the workbook GetConsumption rollover rule.
Tolerance flags use workbook Settings lookback and tolerance values.
Operational baseline keeps up to 3 most recent readings per meter for app runtime use.
Imported capture uploads are materialized as closed cycles using folder-derived capture dates so the next cycle starts from the correct validation baseline.
Older reading history and the legacy meter map remain in the full Utility Dash payload for reference and audit backfill.
